GENERIC_ERROR: Something went wrong. Please try again
AUTH_TOKEN_EXPIRED: Your session has expired. Please sign in again
AUTH_INSUFFICIENT_ROLE: You don't have permission to perform this action
AUTH_EMAIL_ALREADY_EXISTS: An account with this email already exists
AUTH_PASSWORD_RESET_TOKEN_EXPIRED: Password reset link has expired. Request a new one
AUTH_PASSWORD_RESET_TOKEN_USED: This password reset link has already been used
AUTH_EMAIL_VERIFICATION_PIN_INVALID: Invalid code. Check the digits and try again
AUTH_EMAIL_VERIFICATION_PIN_EXPIRED: Code expired. Request a new one
AUTH_EMAIL_VERIFICATION_RATE_LIMITED: Too many attempts. Wait a moment before trying again
AUTH_EMAIL_ALREADY_VERIFIED: This email has already been verified
AUTH_NO_ACTIVE_MEMBERSHIP: Your account is not linked to any organization. Ask the administrator to invite you again.
AUTH_MEMBERSHIP_NOT_FOUND: You don't have access to this account
MEMBERSHIP_CAP_REACHED: This account already has the maximum of 2 secretaries. Remove a secretary or a pending invite before adding another.
MEMBERSHIP_CANNOT_REMOVE_ADMIN: The account administrator cannot be removed. To close the account, use Settings → Account → Delete.
ONBOARDING_NOT_READY: Onboarding isn't ready for that action yet
ONBOARDING_ABUSE_DETECTED: Suspicious activity detected during onboarding. Your account has been removed.
PATIENT_TEMPLATE_LIMIT_REACHED: Patient template limit reached. Remove one before adding another.
PATIENT_TEMPLATE_ALREADY_LINKED: This template is already linked to this patient
INVALID_COUNTRY_CODE: Invalid country code (use ISO 3166-1, e.g. BR, US, PT)
INVALID_PHONE: Invalid phone number for the selected country
PHONE_CONFLICT: This phone number is already registered in this account
TAG_DUPLICATE_NAME: A tag with this name already exists
TEMPLATE_DEFAULT_PATIENT_LIMIT_REACHED: You already have 5 default templates for patient. Remove one before adding another.
TEMPLATE_DEFAULT_CONSULTATION_LIMIT_REAC: You already have 3 default templates for consultation. Remove one before adding another.
FIELD_DUPLICATE_KEY: A field with this key already exists
PATIENT_DOCUMENT_PROFESSIONAL_PROFILE_IN: Your professional profile is incomplete. Add your license number and specialty before creating a document.
DOCUMENT_SHARE_REVOKED: This link was cancelled by the professional
DOCUMENT_SHARE_EXPIRED: This link has expired. Request a new one from the professional
DOCUMENT_SHARE_INVALID_PIN: Incorrect code. Check the message and try again
DOCUMENT_SHARE_RATE_LIMITED: Too many invalid attempts. Wait a few minutes and try again
SIGNATURE_PROVIDER_UNAVAILABLE: Digital signature provider unavailable. Please try again shortly.
SIGNATURE_INVALID_CREDENTIALS: Invalid token. Generate a new one in the BirdID app and try again.
SIGNATURE_AUTH_RATE_LIMITED: Too many attempts. Wait 15 minutes before trying again.
SIGNATURE_SESSION_NOT_FOUND_OR_EXPIRED: Your signature session expired. Authenticate again.
SIGNATURE_CPF_MISMATCH: The CPF provided does not match your profile.
USER_DOCUMENT_REQUIRED_FOR_SIGNATURE: Add your CPF in Settings to use digital signatures.
PATIENT_DOCUMENT_ALREADY_SIGNED: Document already signed. Duplicate it if you need a fresh signature.
PATIENT_DOCUMENT_NOT_SIGNED: Document has not been digitally signed yet.
PATIENT_DOCUMENT_SIGNATURE_INTEGRITY_FAI: Could not verify the integrity of the signed document. Please contact support.
SIGNATURE_ACCOUNT_NOT_ALLOWED: Digital signature is not enabled for this account yet.
TEAM_INVITE_CONFLICT: An invite has already been sent to this email
TEAM_CANNOT_REMOVE_SELF: You cannot remove yourself from the team
WORKPLACE_NOT_MEMBER: You are not a member of this workplace
WORKPLACE_INSUFFICIENT_ROLE: You don't have permission in this workplace
WORKPLACE_CANNOT_REMOVE_LAST_ADMIN: Cannot remove the last workplace admin
WORKPLACE_OWNER_ROLE_IMMUTABLE: The workplace lead's role cannot be changed
WORKPLACE_DELETE_FAILED: Failed to delete workplace. Please try again
SCHEDULE_NOT_PUBLISHED: Schedule has not been published yet
SCHEDULE_SHARE_EXPIRED: This schedule share link has expired
SCHEDULE_SHARE_REVOKED: This schedule share link was revoked by the admin
INVITE_EMAIL_MISMATCH: Email does not match the invite
INVITE_NOT_PENDING: Only pending invites can be resent
INVITE_NO_EMAIL: This invite has no e-mail on file — share the code manually
SECTOR_NAME_TAKEN: A sector with this name already exists in this workplace
CALENDAR_EVENT_INVALID_PATIENT_LINK: Only appointments can be linked to a patient
FEEDBACK_REPORT_IMAGE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED: A report can have at most 3 images
RATE_LIMIT: Too many requests. Please try again later
MAIL_SEND_FAILED: Failed to send email. Please try again in a few minutes
DEVICE_NAME_TAKEN: A device with this name already exists
DEVICE_OFFLINE: The device is not connected. Connect it before sending messages
IDEMPOTENCY_KEY_CONFLICT: This Idempotency-Key was already used with a different payload
NUMBER_NOT_ON_WHATSAPP: This number is not on WhatsApp
WA_GATEWAY_DISABLED: The WhatsApp integration is disabled in this environment
TRANSCRIPTION_SESSION_ACTIVE: An active transcription session already exists for this consultation
TRANSCRIPTION_SESSION_NOT_RECORDING: Transcription session is not accepting new chunks
COPILOT_NO_TRANSCRIPTION: Consultation has no transcription available for analysis
COPILOT_NO_TEMPLATE_FIELDS: Consultation has no field template linked
COPILOT_RATE_LIMITED: Too many copilot requests. Please try again shortly
AI_TOOL_NOT_ALLOWED: This tool is not available for this module
AI_RATE_LIMIT: Too many AI requests. Please wait a moment before trying again
AUTH_RATE_LIMIT: Too many authentication attempts. Please try again later
PUBLIC_RATE_LIMIT: Too many requests. Please wait a few minutes and try again
IMPORT_ALREADY_RUNNING: An import is already running. Wait for it to finish before starting another
IMPORT_ROW_LIMIT_EXCEEDED: The import exceeds the maximum number of contacts per file. Reduce the file and try again
SCHEDULE_IMPORT_ALREADY_RUNNING: A schedule import is already in progress. Finish or cancel it before starting another
SCHEDULE_IMPORT_INVALID_STATUS: This schedule import is no longer at this step
SCHEDULE_IMPORT_FILE_TOO_COMPLEX: The file is too large or complex for AI analysis. Upload only the desired month
SCHEDULE_IMPORT_NO_EVENTS_FOUND: No events were found for that name in the file. Check that the name matches the roster
SUBSCRIPTION_ALREADY_ACTIVE: An active subscription already exists for this account
SUBSCRIPTION_NOT_REFUNDABLE: Refund unavailable — the 7-day window has expired
ACCOUNT_BLOCKED: Your subscription has expired. Choose a plan to continue.
